title: Tax shelters - Canada.ca
content:
The information on these pages replaces the information in Information Sheet T5001-INSTR, Instructions for applying for a tax shelter identification number, which has been discontinued.
- Tax shelters – Know the risk
- Definitions for tax shelters
- Form T5001, Application for Tax Shelter Identification Number and Undertaking to Keep Books and Records
- Form T5003, Statement of Tax Shelter Information
- Form T5003SUM, Tax Shelter Information Return
- Form T5004, Claim for Tax Shelter Loss or Deduction

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
